name: treebark
description: Safe HTML tree structures for Markdown and content-driven apps

scripts.build: tsc && npm run build:browser && npm run build:browser:min && npm run build:browser:dom && npm run build:browser:dom:min && npm run copy:browser
scripts.copy:browser: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); const dir=path.join(__dirname,'../../../docs/assets'); if(!fs.existsSync(dir)) fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true}); for(const f of ['treebark-browser.js','treebark-browser.min.js','treebark-dom-browser.js','treebark-dom-browser.min.js']) fs.copyFileSync(path.join('browser',f), path.join(dir,f));"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build

author: Dan Marshall
